query:
-- Clientes creados por usuarios registrados
SELECT COUNT(*) as clientes_por_usuarios_reales
FROM clients 
WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL);

-- Clientes creados por otros (automáticos)
SELECT COUNT(*) as clientes_automaticos
FROM clients 
WHERE createdBy NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL) OR createdBy IS NULL;

-- Proyectos creados por usuarios registrados
SELECT COUNT(*) as proyectos_por_usuarios_reales
FROM projects 
WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL);

-- Proyectos creados automáticamente
SELECT COUNT(*) as proyectos_automaticos
FROM projects 
WHERE createdBy NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL) OR createdBy IS NULL;

-- Citas creadas por usuarios registrados
SELECT COUNT(*) as citas_por_usuarios_reales
FROM appointments 
WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL);

-- Citas creadas automáticamente
SELECT COUNT(*) as citas_automaticas
FROM appointments 
WHERE createdBy NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL) OR createdBy IS NULL;

-- Cotizaciones creadas por usuarios registrados
SELECT COUNT(*) as cotizaciones_por_usuarios_reales
FROM quotations 
WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL);

-- Cotizaciones creadas automáticamente
SELECT COUNT(*) as cotizaciones_automaticas
FROM quotations 
WHERE createdBy NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL) OR createdBy IS NULL;
